failure.error_msg: output should not be 00000010 assert LogicArray('00000010', Range(7, 'downto', 0)) == 0 + where LogicArray('00000010', Range(7, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(secure_read_write_register_bank.o_data_out).value + where LogicArrayObject(secure_read_write_register_bank.o_data_out) = HierarchyObject(secure_read_write_register_bank).o_data_out
